allow: Bash(git commit -m 'docs: add PROJECT_STRUCTURE.v16 reflecting post-restructure directory layout *)
Bash(git commit -m 'chore: add CLAUDE.md with project-specific rules for Claude Code *)

Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('./game-system/game-data/source/2-cottage-manual/cottage-owned-games.xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, {defval:''}\); console.log\('총 행:', rows.length\); console.log\('헤더:', Object.keys\(rows[0]\)\); console.log\('첫번째 행:', JSON.stringify\(rows[0], null, 2\)\);")
Bash(git commit -m 'chore: update package.json scripts to new directory structure *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: resolve 3 UI bugs in script.js *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: game card description hide when empty, cap at 100 chars *)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./game-system/game-data/staging/bgg-api-snapshot/bgg-game-details.json'\); console.log\('캐시된 게임 수:', Object.keys\(d\).length\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,3\); keys.forEach\(k=>{ const g=d[k]; console.log\(k, '|', g.title, '| image:', !!g.image, '| desc len:', \(g.description||''\).length\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./game-system/game-data/staging/bgg-id-mapping/2-match-map.json'\); const entries=Object.entries\(m\); const confirmed=entries.filter\(\([k,v]\)=>['auto-confirmed','forced'].includes\(v.status\)\); console.log\('전체 매치:', entries.length, '| confirmed/forced:', confirmed.length\); confirmed.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ', k, '->', v.bggId, v.status\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./game-system/game-data/staging/bgg-api-snapshot/bgg-game-details.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); const withImage=keys.filter\(k=>d[k].image\); console.log\('캐시 총수:', keys.length, '| 이미지 있음:', withImage.length\); const sample=keys.filter\(k=>d[k].image\).slice\(0,3\); sample.forEach\(k=>{ const g=d[k]; console.log\(' ', g.title, '| 이미지:', g.image?.slice\(0,50\), '| 설명길이:', g.description?.length\); }\);")
